title: Large Sink Bowls Colour Graphite
description: Made in the UK Made from 100% recycled household plastics Large 11 litre capacity/ Dimensions (L13 x W30 x H14) Easy to Clean, simply rinse or wipe clean. Protects the sink from stains, marks and odours when peeling vegetables or washing up. Durable, made from high quality food safe PP, ideal for the kitchen, utility room, caravan or camping. Description 11Litre Large Rectangular Plastic Washing Up Bowl Description This washing up bow is ideal to protect your sink from stains, odour and residue caused by washing dishes and peeling vegetables, has a nice easy clean finish also structures a curved lipped rim with reinforced carry handles
